problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Lattice-based. Lattice-based cryptography for quantum resistance directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
